rule: Exclude paired samples when the fine-tuned decoder reaches the configured 440-new-token ceiling through a single-character repetition loop and therefore does not produce a usable transcription.

exclusions.reason: Fine-tuned output repeated the character 一 until the generation ceiling; 435 insertions for a 4-character reference.
Fine-tuned output repeated the character 啊 until the generation ceiling; 434 insertions for a 6-character reference.
